description: Subsequent use: Draft of a mercantile letter in Judaeo-Arabic, intended to be sent to Tunisia. Mentions payments for responsa; a complaint about the handling of a shipment of flax destined for Abū Naṣr Yehuda al-Dimashqī and Abū l-Barakāt (acting for Abū Zikrī b. Qayyoma). Also mentions people and places including Abū l-ʿAlā b. Shaʿyā, Abū l-Ḥasan, the late Rabbenu Nissim and al-Mahdiyya. Written over an official Arabic document (see separate record). Dating: 11th century. (Information from CUDL and Goitein's index card.)
